name: Friendship Cake-Amish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together melted butter/margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, cloves, and nutmeg; mix well.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, stirring after each addition.
5. Stir in brandied fruit and chopped pecans.
6. Pour batter into greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
8. Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving.
